title: GitHub repository jinlongbao/frog-ai had no open issues at check time
content: The reported result states that a plugin named github_manager was created and used to query the GitHub repository jinlongbao/frog-ai. The query found 0 current open issues, within a returned range of up to 5 issues. As a result, there were no open issue records available to read for that repository at the time of the check.
